title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
